benefits.description: Plans to use BPC-157 to address stomach issues caused by years of NSAID use

protocol_notes: User has successfully used peptides for weight loss and is exploring BPC-157 for stomach issues from chronic NSAID use. Interested in trying Cerebrolysin and ARA-290 for sciatica pain relief. Previously tried dextromethorphan with some success but abandoned due to side effects (difficulty urinating).
